Getting Started with infoepi.NGOdata

Source: vignettes/articles/quickstart.Rmd
quickstart.Rmd

Overview

The infoepi.NGOdata package provides tools for processing IRS Form 990 nonprofit data. This article shows how to get started with the core functionality.

Installation 

# Install from local source (development version)
# install.packages(".", repos = NULL, type = "source")

library(infoepi.NGOdata)

Quick start

1. Set up project structure 

paths <- irs_project_paths()
print(paths)

irs_ensure_dirs(paths)

2. Parse a single Form 990 XML file 

xml_file <- "path/to/your/990.xml"

ein <- peek_filing_ein(xml_file)
print(paste("EIN:", ein))

filing_data <- parse_990_xml(xml_file)
str(filing_data, max.level = 2)

3. Analyze board members 

board_df <- board_members_to_tibble(filing_data$board_members)
print(board_df)

comp_summary <- compensation_summary(board_df)
print(comp_summary)

top_paid <- top_compensated(board_df, n = 5)
print(top_paid)

4. Process foreign grants 

grants_df <- foreign_grants_to_tibble(filing_data$foreign_grants)
print(grants_df)

regional_grants <- grants_by_region(grants_df)
print(regional_grants)

country_grants <- grants_by_country(grants_df)
print(country_grants)

5. Export results 

irs_export_csv(board_df, "board_members.csv")
irs_export_csv(grants_df, "foreign_grants.csv")

irs_export_json(filing_data, "full_filing.json")

summary_data <- irs_export_filing_summary(filing_data)
print(summary_data)

Batch processing 

args <- list(
  eins = c("123456789", "987654321"),
  years_str = "2020-2022",
  fetch = TRUE,
  do_parse = TRUE,
  analyze = TRUE,
  output = "results"
)

# run_irs990_pipeline(args)

Error handling 

safe_parse <- function(xml_path) {
  tryCatch(
    parse_990_xml(xml_path),
    error = function(e) {
      message("Failed to parse: ", xml_path)
      message("Error: ", e$message)
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
}

xml_files <- c("file1.xml", "file2.xml", "file3.xml")
results <- lapply(xml_files, safe_parse)
results <- results[!sapply(results, is.null)]

Next steps

  • See the function reference for the full API.
  • Home and Get Started on this site.

Getting help

  • Use ?function_name for help on specific functions.
  • Report issues: https://github.com/infoepi-lab/irs-data/issues.
